eventbrite.name: Eventbrite
eventbrite.fee_note: Eventbrite fees: 6.95% + £0.59 per ticket (includes payment processing). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

bookitbee.name: BookitBee
bookitbee.fee_note: BookitBee fees: 2% + 50p per ticket, plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

parentkind.name: Parentkind
parentkind.fee_note: Parentkind costs: £115/year membership + 3.95% platform fee per transaction + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat (£25 for community groups) + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

ticketmaster.name: Ticketmaster
ticketmaster.fee_note: Ticketmaster fees vary by event and venue — this estimate uses approximately 10% + £2.50 per ticket (bundled). Actual fees may be higher or lower. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

hi_events.name: Hi.Events
hi_events.fee_note: Hi.Events cloud fees: 0.75% + ~32p per ticket, plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Self-hosted Hi.Events has no platform fees, only Stripe processing. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).
